overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rainy neon-lit urban highway at night. The vehicle travels through covered road sections with green sound barriers, dense commercial districts with holographic advertisements and neon hotel signage, and concludes in an underground tunnel with distinctive red ambient lighting, encountering varying traffic density throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway with green sound barriers

events.description: passing a black sedan on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the covered highway section, following a white truck ahead while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall green noise-reduction barrier running parallel to the highway
concrete overpass structure creating partial cover above the roadway
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying red and white graphics
yellow-painted concrete lane divider separating traffic flows

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered section of urban highway with green sound barriers on the right and overhead concrete structures providing partial shelter from the rain. Digital billboards illuminate the left side while the vehicle follows a white truck ahead. The road surface is wet and reflective under artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with metal fencing

events.description: exits covered highway section into more open elevated roadway with metal barriers
slight rightward lane adjustment while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: navigating the open highway section, overtaking slower vehicles and adjusting position within the lane

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: vertical metal slat fencing replacing the solid green barriers
road signs suspended over the highway indicating directions

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the vehicle exits the covered section, revealing more sky and transitioning to metal fence barriers on the right. The lighting becomes more mixed with exposure to the night sky. The vehicle overtakes a sedan on the left while digital billboards recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial highway district with hotel signage

events.description: neon hotel sign becomes visible, indicating entry into commercial district
navigating through moderate traffic, passing multiple vehicles

agents.ego_description: weaving through moderate traffic while approaching the commercial district, passing slower vehicles and maintaining speed

notable_agents.action: orange sports car driving parallel in the right lane

entered.detail: large pink and blue neon sign reading HOTEL on a building facade
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows rising in the background
curved highway ramp structure branching off to the left

segments.scene_description: Entering a dense commercial district characterized by prominent neon signage including a large pink HOTEL sign on the right. Glass office towers rise in the background while the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic. The environment is dominated by vibrant neon lighting reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy highway interchange with holographic road markings

events.description: heavy traffic congestion requires lane changes and speed adjustment
sharp lane change to the right to navigate around slower vehicles

agents.ego_description: aggressively navigating through dense traffic, changing lanes multiple times to maintain speed while avoiding other vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan directly ahead braking suddenly, causing evasive maneuver
black car merging into the lane from the right ramp

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway interchange with crossing ramps and bridges
blue holographic light strips projected onto the road surface indicating lanes
bright yellow concrete dividers separating the main highway from exit ramps

segments.scene_description: Navigating a congested highway interchange with dense vehicle traffic requiring frequent lane changes. Blue holographic projections illuminate the road surface while yellow barriers line the left side. The vehicle weaves through multiple cars including a sudden braking sedan ahead and a merging vehicle from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground tunnel with red ambient lighting

events.description: entering underground tunnel with distinctive red lighting strips
ambient lighting shifts to dominant red neon glow from wall-mounted strips

agents.ego_description: descending into the tunnel and maintaining steady speed through the red-lit underground passage with minimal traffic

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with taillights visible ahead in the tunnel

entered.detail: horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the tunnel walls creating ambient glow
smooth concrete walls of the underground tunnel replacing open sky
linear lighting fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends into an underground tunnel characterized by distinctive red neon lighting strips along the walls and ceiling-mounted fixtures. The environment becomes enclosed with concrete walls replacing the open highway, and traffic density drops significantly. The red ambient lighting creates a stark contrast to the previous neon-lit outdoor sections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy urban highway that transforms from a sheltered concrete corridor into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins under overhead concrete structures and beside green sound barriers, following a white truck across a wet, reflective road surface. As the vehicle exits the covered section, the environment opens up to the night sky and the barriers shift to metal fencing while the camera overtakes a sedan on the left. The scene then expands into a dense commercial hub where the lighting shifts to brilliant pinks and blues, dominated by a large neon hotel sign and towering glass office buildings. Finally, the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic as the surrounding cityscape becomes a blur of vibrant holographic reflections on the rain-slicked pavement.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle navigates a congested neon highway before descending into a stark, enclosed tunnel. It begins by weaving through dense traffic at a highway interchange, where blue holographic projections illuminate the road surface and yellow barriers line the left side. As the vehicle maneuvers around a braking sedan and a merging car, the open urban environment gradually gives way to a descending ramp. The scene then shifts abruptly into an underground tunnel, where the expansive city skyline is replaced by concrete walls and ceiling-mounted fixtures. Finally, the lighting transforms from the multicolored glow of the highway to a deep, ambient red that strips away the previous chaos of the traffic.
